temporal_description:
The audio is dominated by an intense and high-energy electronic music track. A close-up, shaky shot focuses on two men in a dimly lit space. The man on the left, in profile, wears a dark suit and looks down. The man on the right, in a light-colored shirt, is adjusting something near his head. The background is dark and indistinct. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters read "风行网". A fast, driving beat and a pulsating bassline create a sense of urgency and action, reminiscent of a modern action movie or video game soundtrack. The music is layered with synthesized melodies and percussive elements, building a mood of suspense and excitement. There is no dialogue or narration in the audio.

The scene cuts to a wide shot of a busy city street at night. People are walking along the sidewalk, some holding umbrellas. A large, illuminated sign in the foreground is prominent, featuring Chinese characters and the English text "NATURE'S RECIPE". The street is lined with various storefronts, and the overall atmosphere is that of a bustling urban environment. The "风行网" text remains in the top left corner.

The camera moves to a shaky, handheld perspective, following a person in a light-colored shirt as they move through a narrow, cluttered space, possibly a backstage area or a narrow alley. The person is seen from the back, and the camera follows them as they navigate past metal structures and other people. The "风行网" text is still visible in the top left corner.
